seo.title: DMCA / Copyright Claims – SSVID
seo.meta_description: SSVID respects copyright laws. Learn how to submit a DMCA or copyright claim request if you believe your rights have been infringed.

sections.content: SSVID respects the intellectual property rights of content owners and complies with applicable copyright laws. We expect our users to do the same when using our services.

SSVID is a technical tool that processes user-submitted links. We do not host, upload, store, or distribute any video or audio content. All content accessed through SSVID is provided by third-party platforms and remains under their control.

If you are a copyright owner or an authorized representative and believe that your copyrighted work has been infringed through the use of SSVID, you may submit a copyright claim by providing the following information:

• Identification of the copyrighted work you claim has been infringed.
• Identification of the material or link that you believe is infringing.
• Your full name and contact information.
• A statement that you have a good-faith belief that the disputed use is not authorized by the copyright owner, its agent, or the law.
• A statement that the information in your notice is accurate and that you are authorized to act on behalf of the copyright owner.
• A physical or electronic signature of the copyright owner or authorized representative.

Please send all DMCA or copyright-related requests via email to:
Email: contact.ssvidcc@gmail.com
Upon receiving a valid copyright complaint, SSVID will review the request and take appropriate action when required. Incomplete or invalid notices may not receive a response.
Because SSVID does not store or control any content, our actions may be limited to restricting access to specific processing features when applicable.
SSVID reserves the right to update this DMCA / Copyright Claims policy at any time. Any changes will be effective immediately upon publication on this page.

For DMCA or copyright-related questions, please contact us at:
Email: contact.ssvidcc@gmail.com
